channel.title: SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Anne Burrell Didn't Show Signs of Suicidal Ideation, Husband Says
item.description: Anne Burrell’s death left her loved ones reeling. And for her husband Stuart Claxton, the nature of her passing—which involved a note expressing suici...

item.title: ANTM's Eva Marcille Was "Amazingly Horrified" By Doc Revelations
item.description: Eva Marcille was left speechless by the revelations made in the new America’s Next Top Model docuseries. Three days after Netflix released its bombshe...

item.title: Texture-Fighting Skincare for the Brightest, Smoothest Skin
item.description: We've all dealt with textured skin at one point or another. Whether you're struggling with skin that is flaky, bumpy, or dull overall, textured skin c...

item.title: How Hilary Duff Explored "Lonely" Feelings With Haylie Duff in Song
item.description: Let the rain fall down, because Hilary Duff is coming clean about her latest song inspiration. As fans speculated Hilary’s new song “We Don’t Talk” wa...

item.title: All the Ways Margot Robbie's Wuthering Heights Deviates From the Book
item.description: Emerald Fennell didn't just sex up Wuthering Heights and call it a day. While moviegoers who anticipated a more R-rated version of Emily Brontë's 1847...

item.title: Ex-'RHOC' Star Elizabeth Lyn Vargas Mourns Former Husband's Death

item.title: Chris Brown's Baby Mama & His Current GF Go Back and Forth on Socials

item.title: 'ANTM' Cycle 3 Winner Eva Marcille Says She Was Shocked by Claims in Doc
item.description: Eva Marcille is making it crystal clear -- she had no clue about the dark side of "America’s Next Top Model" now blowing up in Netflix’s scandal-soake...

item.title: Michael Jackson Pepsi Commercial Led to His Downfall and Death
item.description: Michael Jackson's downfall can be directly traced to the 1984 Pepsi commercial that set his hair ablaze ... and we connect the dots in our new documen...

item.title: Tom Brady’s NoBull Drops New Kicks W/ Livvy Dunne Campaign

item.title: Sylvester Stallone's Best Acting Isn't In Rocky But Is In This '80s Action Movie
An Upcoming Sequel To A 20-Year-Old Film May Be A Major 2026 Box Office Competitor
Billy Bob Thornton's Villain Stole This Infamous 1990s Action Movie With Only 3 Minutes Of Screentime
